rule: Logical requirements only. Values must come from the target secret owner or be reacquired.

requirements.injection: CC Switch or Codex provider owner

requirements.required_for: private remote and GitHub owner operations
requirements.injection: GitHub App, gh keyring, or Secret Vault
requirements.missing_behavior: local mirror remains usable; remote sync blocked

requirements.injection: Secret Vault or Windows Credential Manager

requirements.missing_behavior: local bridge source restores but delivery remains disabled

requirements.required_for: X/Twitter acquisition skills that embed an upstream bearer token
requirements.injection: reacquire from the trusted upstream skill source or inject during owner activation
requirements.missing_behavior: affected X acquisition skill remains disabled
